scripts.android:debug: cd android && JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: cd android && JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" ./gradlew assembleRelease && "C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr\bin\java" -jar "/c/Users/ACRESANPAPHAT/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/build-tools/35.0.0/lib/apksigner.jar" sign --ks ../poa.keystore --ks-key-alias poa --ks-pass env:KEYSTORE_PASS --key-pass env:KEYSTORE_PASS --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-signed.apk app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk
